user_trading_data.title: User Trading Data
user_trading_data.description: Stores trading account details for a specific user.

accountType.description: The type of trading account (e.g., Quotex).

status.description: The current status of the account (e.g., Active).

availableBalance.description: The current available balance in the account.

totalWithdrawals.description: The total amount withdrawn from the account.

initialCapital.description: The starting capital for the account.

todayPnL.description: The profit or loss for the current day.

lastUpdated.description: The timestamp of the last update.

/user_trading_data/{email}.description: Collection of user trading data indexed by email.
